title: RevampedWolf
description: This mod aims to revamp the wolf mob
body:
# RevampedWolf

![armored_wolfs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AV4N1OZQ/images/c0b90c2d99a230c197a15975abf591685615ceae.png)

Revamped Wolf is that mod that updates the poor wolf to increase it's depth of gameplay and give it some new abilities.

Features: 

- Wild wolves have a pack leader which other wolves will follow.
- Wild wolves only attack animals when they're hungry.
- Wolves can pick up food items from the ground to eat.
- New wolf armor types.
- Wolves use saturation for healing. (8.0.0+)
- New hunting AI.

Saturation system info: When eating meat, wolves increase saturation like the player does. After taking damage this saturation is consumed to heal them.

**Credit:**

*   8HP - Made wolf armor textures!
*   evo\_934 - Revamped the wolf armor to have a more vanilla feel!

Warning: backport not planned
